issues.title: Incorrect table name
issues.problem: The table name 'employees' does not exist in the schema.

issues.title: Use of SELECT *
issues.problem: Using SELECT * can lead to performance issues and makes it unclear which columns are being used.
issues.fix: SELECT transaction_id, amount, status, merchant_id, customer_id, transaction_date, payment_method FROM sigma_analytics.fact_transactions;

review.corrected_sql: SELECT transaction_id, amount, status, merchant_id, customer_id, transaction_date, payment_method FROM sigma_analytics.fact_transactions;
review.summary: The query has a critical correctness issue due to an incorrect table name and a readability issue with the use of SELECT *.
